headline: Big Drop in Black Friday Retails Store Traffic Compared To 2019 As Many Shoppers Opt To Go Online
summary: Preliminary data shows a drop of 28.3% in foot traffic at U.S. retails stores on Black Friday as compared to 2019 levels.

headline: Benzinga's Bulls And Bears Of The Past Week: Johnson & Johnson, Nike, Apple, Tesla And More
summary:
Benzinga has examined the prospects for many investor favorite stocks over the past week. 
	Last week's bullish calls included a big tech company and a popular footwear maker.

headline: EV Week In Review: Tesla Hikes Prices Amid Supply Chain Challenges, XPeng Impresses With Q3, Rivian Sounds Out R13 Delay, LA Auto Show And More
summary:
EV stocks were mostly lower in the holiday-shortened week ending Nov. 26, with much of the weakness attributed to the late-week across-the-market sell-off due to fears over a "more serious" COVID-19 variant strain originating in South Africa.

U.S.-listed Chinese EV startups however, managed to carve out gains for the week.

headline: At A Loss For Holiday Gift Ideas? Here're Some Suggestions For You
summary: After the atypical 2020  holiday season,  where purchases were made online, in-person shopping has returned with 2021. In fact, customers have the option of capitalizing on the best of both the worlds.
